name: io.github.nolenation04/anchord
title: Anchord (AnchorID)
description: Read-only MCP for identity resolution and write guardrails.

environmentVariables.name: ANCHORD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Anchord API key (Bearer token). Get one at https://app.anchord.ai/signup

environmentVariables.name: ANCHORD_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Anchord API base URL. Defaults to https://api.anchord.ai
